[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: AI Agent (software & documentation)

- Description: Newsletter workbook: Email 360 + IMPORTRANGE mirrors (email→QR→SKU)

  Details:
  **Estimated session time:** 30 minutes (documentation + Sheets automation + git).
  
  **Theme:** Newsletter workbook analytics — join **recipient email** to **QR / SKU / shipment** context for campaign planning and forensics.
  
  **What changed**
  
  - **go_to_market** (`market_research`): Added `scripts/setup_newsletter_workbook_mirrors.py` — `IMPORTRANGE` mirrors (Subscribers, QR codes, SKUs, Currencies) from Main Ledger into spreadsheet `1ed3q3SJ8ztGwfWit6Wxz_S72Cn5jKQFkNrHpeOVXP8s`; **Email 360** sheet (lookup email in B2 → newsletter rows, QR rows by Owner Email, SKUs via ledger URL slug → **Shipment**, subscriber row, campaign digest); **Workbook context** tab for operators. Re-runnable with `--yes`. Does not clear **Agroverse News Letter Emails**.
  - **agentic_ai_context**: Updated `AGROVERSE_NEWSLETTER_WORKFLOW.md` (dedicated workbook, mirrors, open/click columns, `setup_newsletter_workbook_mirrors.py`); appended `CONTEXT_UPDATES.md`.
  - **sentiment_importer** (no separate PR this round): `Gdrive::NewsletterEmails::SPREADSHEET_ID` already pointed at `1ed3q3…` on `master` (commit `35fc7f65`) so Edgar open/click matches the send log; removed stray `binding.pry` from `newsletter_controller#click` locally before push.
  
  **Pull requests (GitHub evidence)**
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/70
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/45
  
  **Operator follow-up**
  
  - Open the newsletter workbook once as a human to **Allow access** for each `IMPORTRANGE` if Google prompts.
  - Redeploy Edgar if production was not yet on the new spreadsheet ID.
